2605.30268.title: PhyGenHOI: Physically-Aware 4D Generation of Dynamic Human-Object Interactions
2605.30268.paper_summary: We address the task of generating physically accurate and visually faithful 4D Human-Object Interaction (HOI). Given a static 3D human and target object represented as 3D Gaussian Splats (3DGS), our goal is to synthesize dynamic scenes where the human actively engages with the object through actions, such as punching or kicking, in accordance with a given input text. To this end, we introduce PhyGenHOI, a novel framework that couples generative human motion with an explicit physical object simulation. We model the human as a semantic agent driven by a Motion Diffusion Model (MDM) and the object as a physical agent simulated via the Material Point Method (MPM), utilizing 3D Gaussians as a unified, differentiable representation. We supervise their interaction through three coupled mechanisms: (1) A Windowed Attraction Loss that temporally synchronizes generative motion to intercept the object; (2) A Contact-Driven Re-simulation step that triggers physically consistent momentum transfer upon impact; and (3) A Masked Video-SDS objective that injects video-based priors to enhance contact fidelity. Experiments show PhyGenHOI generates physically consistent 4D HOI across diverse actions, humans, and objects, outperforming baselines. Project page and videos: https://omerbenishu.github.io/PhyGenHOI/
2605.30268.paper_summary_zh: 我們針對生成物理準確且視覺忠實的 4D 人類-物體互動 (HOI) 任務進行探討。給定一個靜態的 3D 人類和目標物體，這些物體以 3D 高斯斑點 (3DGS) 表示，我們的目標是合成動態場景，其中人類通過動作（如揮拳或踢擊）主動與物體互動，並根據給定的輸入文本進行。為此，我們引入了 PhyGenHOI，一個新穎的框架，將生成的人類運動與明確的物理物體模擬結合在一起。我們將人類建模為一個由運動擴散模型 (MDM) 驅動的語義代理，並將物體建模為通過材料點方法 (MPM) 模擬的物理代理，利用 3D 高斯作為統一的、可微分的表示。我們通過三個耦合機制來監督它們的互動：（1）一個窗口吸引損失，該損失在時間上同步生成的運動以攔截物體；（2）一個接觸驅動的重新模擬步驟，在撞擊時觸發物理一致的動量轉移；以及（3）一個遮罩視頻-SDS 目標，該目標注入基於視頻的先驗，以增強接觸的真實性。實驗顯示，PhyGenHOI 在各種動作、人類和物體中生成物理一致的 4D HOI，超越了基準。項目頁面和視頻：https://omerbenishu.github.io/PhyGenHOI/
2605.30268.author: Omer Benishu et.al.
2605.30268.authors: Omer Benishu, Gal Fiebelman, Sagie Benaim
